text:
Market today: The chip sector is showing signs of optimism, which is the real driver for your concentrated tech book. Other news is noise.

Your holdings: SOXL is down 20% and still at WATCH status. SPAL is down 9.5% and new. PTNM is down 15% and new. These leveraged names are feeling it.

Watch: Micron's positive signal for chips is key. Keep an eye on how the market digests this.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged chip positions and watching for further chip sector confirmation.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming if it breaks below 200, given leverage and decay.
SPAL: Watch the 21.38 stop, as it's a new, leveraged position.
No new buys today - hold and watch
